title: rhododendron × chamaezelum
intro: Rhododendron × chamaezelum, also known as Alpine Rose, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Rhododendron and Genista. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alpine Rose include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Alpine Rose can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
